title: Co-floatation assay of VPS13C with SUVs
author: Dazhi Li
materials: Buffer D (200 mM NaCl, 25 mM HEPES, pH 7.5)

steps.title: Mix 16:0-18:1 PC (POPC) (format: Chloroform)...
steps.instruction: Mix 16:0-18:1 PC (POPC) (format: Chloroform) Avanti Polar Lipids Catalog #850457C , 16:0-18:1 PE Avanti Polar Lipids, Inc. Catalog #850757 , 18:1 DGS-NTA(Ni) (format: Chloroform) Avanti Polar Lipids Catalog #790404C , and Rhod-PE Avanti Polar Lipids, Inc. Catalog #810150 at 84.8:10:5:0.2 mol%.

steps.title: Extrude the liposomes 31 times through...
steps.instruction: Extrude the liposomes 31 times through a 200 nm polycarbonate filter using the Avanti Mini-Extruder to generate SUVs.

steps.title: Subject the suspension to five freeze–thaw cycles
steps.instruction: Subject the suspension to five freeze–thaw cycles.

steps.title: Incubate the suspension at 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the suspension at 37 °C for 01:00:00 , mixing gently every 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Rehydrate the dried lipid film in...
steps.instruction: Rehydrate the dried lipid film in buffer D (200 mM NaCl, 25 mM HEPES, pH 7.5, 1 mM TCEP) to a final lipid concentration of 10 millimolar (mM) .

steps.title: Dry the lipid mixture under a...
steps.instruction: Dry the lipid mixture under a gentle nitrogen stream and desiccate under vacuum overnight.

steps.title: In a 100 μL reaction, mix...
steps.instruction: In a 100 μL reaction, mix 1–5 μg purified full-length VPS13C or VPS13C-ΔATG2C with 1 mM SUVs.

steps.title: Analyze a 10 μL input sample...
steps.instruction: Analyze a 10 μL input sample and 30% of the top fraction by SDS-PAGE on 3–8% Tris-acetate precast gels.

steps.title: Collect 100 μL from the top fraction containing floated SUVs
steps.instruction: Collect 100 μL from the top fraction containing floated SUVs.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 193,911 × g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 193,911 × g for 01:00:00 in an SW-55 Ti rotor 18 °C .

steps.title: Transfer the sample to a 0
steps.instruction: Transfer the sample to a 0.8 mL ultracentrifuge tube (Cat. #344090, Beckman), then overlay with 300 μL of 20% OptiPrep and 100 μL reconstitution buffer.

steps.title: For the flotation assay, mix 90...
steps.instruction: For the flotation assay, mix 90 μL of the reaction with an equal volume of 60% OptiPrep (Cat. #D1556, Sigma Aldrich) to generate a 30% layer.

steps.title: Add equal mass of Rab7A(Q67L/T22N)-6xHis or...
steps.instruction: Add equal mass of Rab7A(Q67L/T22N)-6xHis or 6xHis-ATG7 as a negative control, together with 1 mM GTP and 2 mM Mg 2+ , and incubate at room temperature for 00:20:00 .

steps.title: Quantify band intensities in ImageJ and...
steps.instruction: Quantify band intensities in ImageJ and calculate floated protein as the normalized top fraction divided by the input, shown as a percentage.
